hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Knowledge capture check: if this session made durable architecture, product, ritual, naming, or tradeoff decisions, run the shoonaya-knowledge-curator agent and update .claude/knowledge/INDEX.md. Skip for routine bug fixes or mechanical edits."}}'

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
